name: ꒰ა Fluixon ໒꒱
description:
“I mean, it isn’t the end of the world, is it?”

HIGHSCHOOL AU

BOT INFO:

highschool au, in which fluixon is your rival, but also the vice president of the school council. one day, he decides to fucking spread the nastiest misinformation about you in hopes of ruining your reputation

ANY POV! 1st scenario: they/them pronouns, 2nd scenario: he/him pronouns, 3rd scenario: she/her pronouns

COOL ASS NOTE:

alr so this is my first bot ever on this account, hurray! restarted all over again, since my former account was pretty much tied to a fandom i wasn’t interested in anymore. (NOBODY will recognize me yo)

my goals? just create bots i guess lol

REQUESTS:

request bot is a wip, im currently testing the waters and will probably create one around 10-20 followers. in the meantime, u can drop a request in the comments!
